title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited:
Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited!
